name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Hudson Oaks, TX TitleMax Title Loans at 3517 Fort Worth Hwy offers fast title loans with same-day approval.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates at 3517 Fort Worth Hwy in Hudson Oaks, TX as a standalone storefront. This location serves Hudson Oaks residents and surrounding communities seeking title-secured lending. The Hudson Oaks branch maintains hours Mon–Fri 10AM–7PM and Sat 10AM–4PM.

At this location, TitleMax Title Loans specializes in title loans using your vehicle as collateral, with rapid approval and same-day funding available for eligible customers. Call +1 817-599-3240 to receive a free quote, confirm your vehicle's loan value, and learn about the terms specific to your situation.

Residents of Hudson Oaks should bring their vehicle title, government-issued ID, and proof of residence when visiting. Title loans work well for unexpected expenses or when other financing options are slow; TitleMax Title Loans completes most approvals the same day.
address: 3517 Fort Worth Hwy, Hudson Oaks, TX 76087

company_info.headquarters: 3517 Fort Worth Hwy, Hudson Oaks, TX 76087

pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types—credit score is not the primary lending criteria
Customers keep driving their vehicle while using title as collateral
Offers flexible line-of-credit option to withdraw funds all at once or over time
Bilingual services available at Memphis location
Extended business hours (9am-7pm weekdays, open Saturdays)
High customer satisfaction rating (5.0/5 with 481+ reviews) with named staff recognition
cons: APR, fees, and repayment terms not disclosed on website—borrowers cannot assess true cost before applying
Vehicle title is used as collateral—default risk could result in loss of vehicle
Online unsecured personal loans limited to 11 states; not available nationwide
No information provided on loan amounts, typical terms, or eligibility thresholds
Title pledge requires clear vehicle title and valid government ID—excludes those without vehicle ownership
best_for: Vehicle owners facing unexpected expenses who need same-day or next-day cash
Consumers with poor or no credit history who are unable to qualify for traditional loans
Individuals who can afford to borrow against their vehicle and want to keep driving during repayment
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners with limited credit options who need emergency cash within one business day and can afford to pledge their vehicle title as collateral. The main caveat is that APR and fee information is not publicly disclosed on their website, so borrowers must contact the company directly to understand the true cost of borrowing before committing.
services: Vehicle title pledges (secured loans using car title as collateral)
Flex line of credit tied to title pledge with flexible withdrawal options
Unsecured personal lines of credit (in-store and online)
Credit checks and vehicle valuation assessments
Online account management portal for title loans
Online account management portal for personal loans
Multiple Memphis-area locations for customer access
meta_description: Hudson Oaks, TX: TitleMax Title Loans at 3517 Fort Worth Hwy offers fast title loans with same-day approval for auto owners.
